title: Strategic Impact
headline: From Kaggle idea to executive-sponsored programs
subtitle: Independently sourced, pitched, and secured two major AI initiatives — one SVP-sponsored saving $20–50M annually, one Chief Scientist-sponsored within a €14M EU consortium.

programs.title: Drug Safety Platform
bullets: Projected $20M–$50M in annual savings by reducing animal studies.
Compressed safety timelines from five to three years.
Secured project funding and led development with a 12-member team.
Architected a model-agnostic multimodal platform integrating omics, imaging, and molecular data.

programs.title: Broad Institute Collaboration
bullets: Initiated collaboration with Dr. Shantanu Singh (Senior Group Leader).
Co-developing computational pipelines for Cell Painting and omics.
Developing multimodal computation pipelines at the research frontier.
Bridging pharma R&D with academic research excellence.

programs.title: Persister Analysis — Oncology
bullets: Persister-Seq Consortium across 14 partner institutions in Europe.
Novel tumor recurrence prediction using single-cell transcriptomics.
Achieved 90% F1 on internal benchmarks; 13%+ over state-of-the-art.
Secured project and led end-to-end development.

programs.title: AACR 2025 Conference
bullets: Presented at AACR 2025 — the top oncology research conference globally.
AI-driven identification of drug-tolerant persister cells in lung cancer.
Three-month AI pipeline development cycle with two AI engineers.
Also presented at AACR 2024 and 2023 on CT tumor segmentation.

highlights.text: Secured $0.5M to lead AI development within a $3M+ SVP-sponsored AstraZeneca initiative projected to deliver $20M-$50M in annual savings.
Secured and led a Chief Scientist-sponsored AI initiative within a €14M EU research consortium spanning 14 partner institutions across Europe.
Translated bottom-up AI vision into executive-sponsored strategic initiatives — an SVP-sponsored program and a Chief Scientist-sponsored program.
